strengths: Strong Python and SQL hands-on experience
Proven ETL and data modeling skills
Quantified business impact (process time, acquisition gains)
Cloud and database familiarity (Snowflake, BigQuery, AWS S3)
weaknesses: Limited explicit production ML model deployment details
Shorter total data science years (resume ~2+ years)
Less explicit experience with A/B experimentation
improvement_bullets: Developed and deployed machine learning models, including regression analysis for customer churn prediction, directly informing marketing strategy and CRM optimization.
Designed A/B experimentation frameworks to evaluate marketing campaign performance, utilizing statistical significance testing to validate business improvement opportunities.
Applied retail-focused data mining techniques to identify high-value customer purchase patterns, utilizing Snowflake and Python to drive data-driven decision-making.
Built and maintained end-to-end data pipelines in Snowflake, integrating multi-source retail datasets to support predictive modeling and automated reporting.
Spearheaded the research and implementation of emerging AI/ML techniques to enhance business strategy, ensuring the team remains at the forefront of industry best practices.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Scientist opportunity with David Yurman. I am interested in this opportunity because of David Yurman’s unique position at the intersection of artistic craftsmanship and luxury retail innovation. What interests me about working for David Yurman is its dedication to creative collaboration and its iconic legacy; as a data professional, the prospect of applying analytical rigor to such an esteemed brand inspires me. I believe my proficiency in building end-to-end machine learning models and my experience in quantitative retail analytics would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my career, I have approached complex problems by bridging the gap between raw technical data and actionable business strategy. In fact, at Shine Masters, I developed time-series models to identify high-value customer segments and integrated automation workflows that resulted in a 300% increase in new customer acquisition. This experience taught me how to synthesize large datasets into clear, profitable outcomes, a skill I am eager to apply to David Yurman’s strategic business goals. Ultimately, I know that the Data Scientist role at David Yurman would allow me to bring my expertise in statistical modeling to support key departments like Marketing and CRM. Additionally, my role as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my data visualization and storytelling skills. I led the analysis of 250k+ rows of demographic data, translating statistical insights into an interactive Tableau dashboard for stakeholders. This project sharpened my ability to communicate complex findings to non-technical partners, ensuring project objectives remained aligned with business needs. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python, SQL, and predictive modeling in working on data integration and ML-driven growth at David Yurman. I know that my technical agility and strategic mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Scientist role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
